name: Changsheng Tongqing CSI 800 Trenched fund (LOF)
summary: Changsheng Tongqing CSI 800 Trenched fund (LOF) is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF) managed by Changsheng Fund Management. It tracks the CSI 800 Index and uses a trenched (or structured) fund design, offering different levels of risk and return through various tranches.
